raw: Discount : Free admission for up to 9 people. Visit the main desk at the library to pick up your discount coupon. Discount coupons can be picked up from the library up to 1 week in advance. To use: Admission to the museum is first come, first serve basis. Be sure to bring the discount coupon with you to the museum the day of your visit. ATTENTION : Patrons must be at least 18 YEARS OF AGE to book discount passes. Reservations made using a child's card will be DENIED . Patron's must reserve passes using their own library card, do not change the name on your reservation . If another member of your household will be checking out your discount pass, you must contact the library in advance. If booking a pass with an e-card , patrons must also provide proof of address when they arrive at the library to pick-up their pass and will be switched over to a physical library card. Unwanted passes MUST BE CANCELLED. Failure to cancel an unwanted pass will result in a 30 day ban on reserving discount passes.
